subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Aid me to serve Thy loved ones, to expand the breasts of Thy servants, and to gladden the hearts of Thy chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب ايدنی علی خدمة احبائک و شرح صدور أرقائک و تطييب قلوب اصفيائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
